Meaning.En: A connected series of railway cars used for transporting passengers or freight.
Meaning.Example: The train arrived at the station ten minutes late.

Situation.Vi: Hành khách chờ trên platform để lên tàu.
Situation.En: Passengers wait on the platform to board the train.

Meaning.Vi: đào tạo; huấn luyện; huấn luyện (động vật)
Meaning.En: To teach or gain knowledge, skill, or ability through instruction or practice; to develop or discipline (an animal) by instruction and practice.
Meaning.Example: She trained as a nurse before moving to Canada.

Situation.Vi: Cô ấy đang tập luyện để chuẩn bị cho giải marathon.
Situation.En: She is training to prepare for the marathon.

Situation.Vi: Chó được huấn luyện để dẫn đường cho người khiếm thị.
Situation.En: Dogs are trained to guide visually impaired people.
